description: Suggested OpenClaw config patch for Playwright-first career automation. This file is for targeted future optimization and is NOT auto-applied.
goals: Reduce context bloat during long job-search runs
Prefer deterministic single-thread execution for browser-heavy work

deprecatedDefaultPath: scripts/crawl4ai/* as the default front door

applyGuidance: Do not auto-apply this patch blindly; compare with current config first.
Keep the existing browser.user.cdpUrl integration unchanged unless Chromium debugging port changes.
For browser-heavy job-search sessions, prefer lower concurrency over more parallelism.
Use this file as the reference when making future OpenClaw config adjustments for career automation.
